items.title: Photographer Rescues Man Trapped Under Rubble of His Tornado-Ravaged Home
items.summary: A news photographer documenting tornado damage helped rescue a man trapped under the rubble of his home -- in what he described as the most dramatic experience of his 20-year career. [Read More]

items.title: You Can Now Fly Around Google Earth in an Airplane
items.summary: Google Earth has introduced a flight simulator mode, enabling users to fly through the vast amount of aerial photography data the company has amassed. [Read More]

items.title: The FBI Seizes Multiple Drones Near World Cup Venues and Warns of $100K Fines
items.summary: The FBI says it has already seized multiple drones and made at least one arrest since World Cup matches began last week, warning that individuals flying aerial devices near event sites could face fine…

items.title: Don McCullin’s Final Photo Book Will Look Back at His 16 Trips to Vietnam
items.summary: Legendary war photographer Don McCullin has announced that his final book will be a retrospective on the Vietnam War. [Read More]
